payload.additional_notes: Sliding glass door has vertical blinds; curtains on left windows. Fireplace with mantel below wall-mounted TV. Staircase visible on right leading upward.
payload.image_summary: A traditional living room with beige walls and carpet, two leather recliners/couches facing a fireplace and wall-mounted TV, sliding glass door at rear, staircase and railing to the right, table lamp on a side table, and various small decor items near the fireplace.
